scripts.package:teacher-native: pnpm --dir core run build && npm run build:teacher-shell && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File native/package-native.ps1
scripts.build:teacher-native: npm run build:native:configure && npm run build:native && npm run package:teacher-native
scripts.build:teacher-native-installer: npm run build:teacher-native && npm run package:teacher-native-installer
